welcome.subject: Welcome to Regio — Book Your Verification Call
welcome.heading: Hey {name}!
welcome.intro1: Thanks for joining Regio! We're stoked to have you on board.
welcome.intro2: To keep our community safe and awesome, we just need to do a quick identity check via a short video call before you can start trading.
welcome.step1: Pick a slot that works for you above.
welcome.step2: Join the video call at the scheduled time.
welcome.step3: Once verified, you're all set to go!
welcome.footer_note: You're receiving this email because you registered an account with Regio.

booking_reminder.subject: Don't forget — Book your Regio verification call
booking_reminder.heading: Still there, {name}?
booking_reminder.intro: We noticed you haven't booked your identity check yet. It's a short video call, and it's the last step before you can start trading on Regio.
booking_reminder.step1: Pick a slot that works for you above.
booking_reminder.step2: Join the video call at the scheduled time.
booking_reminder.step3: Once verified, you're all set to go!
booking_reminder.outro: It only takes a few minutes. We're looking forward to meeting you!
booking_reminder.footer_note: You're receiving this email because you registered an account with Regio.

subject.VERIFIED: Your Regio Account Has Been Verified
subject.ACTION_REQUIRED: Action Required for Your Regio Account

verification_status.verified_intro: Your account is now fully verified and active. Welcome to the Regio community!
verification_status.verified_can_title: What you can do on Regio:
verification_status.verified_step1: Browse and post local offers and requests (goods, services, time)
verification_status.verified_step2: Connect and trade with neighbors using Regio credits
verification_status.verified_step3: Build trust in your local community — no money needed
verification_status.verified_video_intro: New to Regio? Watch our short intro to get started:
verification_status.verified_signoff:
If you have any questions, just reply to this email.
The Regio Team
verification_status.rejected_intro: Quick update: your account verification didn't go through this time.
verification_status.rejected_outro: If you think this is a mistake, just reach out to us!
verification_status.action_intro: Your verification is almost there, but we need you to take a look at this:
verification_status.action_outro: Drop us a message once you've checked it!
verification_status.footer_note: You're receiving this because your account status was updated.

payment_reminder.subject: Payment Reminder — Action Required on Regio
payment_reminder.heading: Hey {name},
payment_reminder.intro: This is a reminder that you have a payment request from {creditor} that has been pending for {days} days.
payment_reminder.outro_pre: Please confirm or dispute this request as soon as possible.
payment_reminder.deadline: If no action is taken within 7 days of the original request, the payment will be processed automatically.
payment_reminder.footer_note: You're receiving this because you have a pending payment request in Regio.

subject.creditor: Your Payment Request Was Automatically Processed — Regio
subject.debtor: Automatic Payment Processed From Your Account — Regio

payment_enforced.heading: Hey {name},
payment_enforced.creditor_line: Your payment request to {party} has been automatically processed after 7 days with no response.
payment_enforced.debtor_line: A payment request from {party} has been automatically processed from your account after 7 days with no action taken.
payment_enforced.outro: This payment was automatically executed by the Regio system in accordance with the 7-day payment rule. You can view it in your transaction history.
payment_enforced.footer_note: You're receiving this because a payment involving your account was automatically processed.

request_rejected.subject: Your Payment Request Was Declined — Regio
request_rejected.heading: Hey {name},
request_rejected.outro: If you believe this is a mistake, you can raise a dispute and an admin will review it.
request_rejected.footer_note: You're receiving this because a payment request you sent was declined.

subject.creditor: Your Dispute Has Been Resolved — Regio

dispute_resolved.heading: Hey {name},
dispute_resolved.creditor_approved: Your dispute has been approved. The payment has been processed and the funds are on their way.
dispute_resolved.creditor_cancelled: Your dispute has been reviewed. After consideration, the admin has sided with the other party and the payment request has been cancelled.
dispute_resolved.debtor_approved: A payment dispute concerning your account has been resolved. The admin has approved the creditor's claim and the payment has been processed from your account.
dispute_resolved.debtor_cancelled: A payment dispute concerning your account has been resolved in your favour. The payment request has been cancelled.
dispute_resolved.outro: If you have any questions, please reach out to the Regio team.
dispute_resolved.footer_note: You're receiving this because a payment dispute involving your account was resolved.

broadcast_digest.subject: Regio Update: {title}
broadcast_digest.intro2: Here's a new update from the Regio team you might find interesting:
broadcast_digest.footer_note: You're receiving this because you have email digests enabled in your Regio profile.

password_reset.subject: Reset Your Regio Password
password_reset.heading: Hey {name},
password_reset.intro: We received a request to reset your Regio password. Click the button below to set a new one.
password_reset.notice: This link expires in 30 minutes. If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password won't change.
password_reset.footer_note: You're receiving this email because a password reset was requested for your Regio account.

email_change_confirm.subject: Confirm your new Regio email address
email_change_confirm.heading: Hey {name},
email_change_confirm.intro: Please confirm that you want to use this address as your new Regio email. Click the button below to complete the change.
email_change_confirm.notice: This link expires in 24 hours. If you did not request this change, you can safely ignore this email.
email_change_confirm.footer_note: You're receiving this because an email change was requested for your Regio account.

email_change_notify.subject: Your Regio email address is being changed
email_change_notify.heading: Hey {name},
email_change_notify.intro: A request has been made to change the email address on your Regio account to:
email_change_notify.confirm_hint: A confirmation link has been sent to the new address. The change will only take effect once confirmed.
email_change_notify.notice: If you did not request this change, please contact us immediately — your account may be at risk.
email_change_notify.footer_note: You're receiving this because an email change was requested for your Regio account.

admin_new_user.subject: New Regio registration — {name} ({code})
admin_new_user.heading: New registration pending verification
admin_new_user.intro: A new user has just registered on Regio and is awaiting their verification call.
admin_new_user.outro: They will remain pending until their identity check is completed.
admin_new_user.footer_note: You're receiving this email as the Regio system administrator.
